165 E1H E1H_HLTH_COMPLAIN (E1H) Repetitive Health Complaints CHAR 1 Mood and behavior patterns: indicators of depression, anxiety, sad mood - verbal expressions of distress - repetitive health complaints. 0 = Indicator not exhibited in last 30 days, 1 = Indicator of this type exhibited up to five days a week, 2 =
